case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR VS. PABLO BARRERA

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-30-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-30-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JUMA BYRD--CCSF TAX COLLECTOR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BARRERA, PABLO $1,511.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.96 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,556.96 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,511.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO/TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT BARRERA, PABLO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-30-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.96 - SERVED MAR-30-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BARRERA, PABLO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-30-2013 - JUDGMENT.
